issues: Code uses output columns 'date', but also uses 'bullish_emoji_ratio', 'bearish_emoji_ratio', and 'mention_volume' which are NOT in the adapter contract returns (only 'date', 'posts', 'comments' are allowed).
Signal logic uses pct_change() on columns not specified in adapter returns, violating spec contract.
Signal logic correctly implements buy condition as bullish_emoji_ratio_day_over_day_increase > 150% and mention_volume_day_over_day_increase >= 50%.
Signal logic correctly implements sell condition as bearish_emoji_ratio_day_over_day_increase > 150% and mention_volume_day_over_day_increase >= 50%, or days held >= 5.
Allocation logic uses 2% total portfolio allocation divided equally across universe, which is stricter than spec (spec says 2% per position).
Allocation logic does not allocate 2% per position but splits 2% total across all positions, which does not follow spec intent.
